inclusions: Sausages and similar products, of meat, meat offal, blood or insects
Food preparations based on sausages, meat, meat offal, blood or insects
Homogenised preparations of meat, meat offal, blood or insects, for infants or dietetic use, in containers not exceeding 250g (subheading 1602.10)
Other prepared or preserved meat, meat offal, blood or insects
Extracts and juices of meat, fish or crustaceans, molluscs or other aquatic invertebrates
Prepared or preserved fish; caviar and caviar substitutes prepared from fish eggs
Crustaceans, molluscs and other aquatic invertebrates, prepared or preserved
Food preparations containing more than 20% by weight of sausage, meat, meat offal, blood, insects, fish, crustaceans, molluscs or other aquatic invertebrates

exclusions.condition: Meat, meat offal, fish, crustaceans, molluscs or other aquatic invertebrates, or insects prepared or preserved by processes specified in Chapter 2 or 3
Products prepared or preserved by processes of Note 6 to Chapter 4
Products prepared or preserved by processes of heading 05.04
Stuffed products of heading 19.02 (e.g., stuffed pasta), even if containing more than 20% meat/fish
Food preparations of heading 21.03 (sauces, mixed condiments) even if containing more than 20% meat/fish
Food preparations of heading 21.04 (soups, broths, composite homogenised preparations) even if containing more than 20% meat/fish

classification_rules.description: Food preparations fall in Chapter 16 only if they contain MORE THAN 20% by weight of sausage, meat, meat offal, blood, insects, fish, crustaceans, molluscs or aquatic invertebrates, or any combination thereof.
When a preparation contains two or more qualifying ingredients, it is classified in the heading of Chapter 16 corresponding to the component or components which predominate BY WEIGHT.

Subheading 1602.10 (homogenised preparations) takes precedence over ALL other subheadings of heading 16.02. Applies to finely homogenised preparations, for infants/young children or dietetic purposes, in retail containers of net weight NOT exceeding 250g.

Fish, crustaceans, molluscs and other aquatic invertebrates specified in subheadings of 16.04 or 16.05 under their common names only, are of the SAME species as those mentioned in Chapter 3 under the same name.
